buildings.name: Cascade Tower
buildings.description: Flagship engineering building. Open floor plan with dedicated focus pods. Rooftop terrace with views of the Cascades. Houses the largest engineering teams.

buildings.name: Evergreen Hall
buildings.description: Creative hub for product and design teams. Features collaboration spaces, whiteboard walls, and a user research lab. Named for the iconic Pacific NW evergreen trees.

buildings.name: Olympic Center
buildings.description: Commercial heart of Cascade Innovations. Home to marketing and sales with a modern demo center for client presentations. Named for the Olympic Mountains.

buildings.name: Rainier Pavilion
buildings.description: Houses finance, legal, and compliance teams. Quiet, professional environment with a law library and secure document storage. Named for Mount Rainier.

buildings.name: Puget Innovation Hub
buildings.description: Secondary engineering campus with dedicated DevOps and IT infrastructure. Features a hardware prototyping lab and server monitoring center.

buildings.name: Baker Research Lab
buildings.description: Executive offices and HR. Modern, sustainable design with LEED Gold certification. Includes the main boardroom and employee wellness center.
